Personal Details:
  Date of Birth:  2nd Jan, 1996
Work Rights: Full Working Rights
Professional Summary 
AI Engineer with 4+ years of experience building and deploying machine learning solutions in production 
environments. Strong background in Python, data pipelines, and applied AI, with experience developing 
systems that extract insights from structured and unstructured data. 
Hands-on experience with generative AI, NLP, and data processing workflows, with growing exposure to 
document understanding and computer vision techniques such as OCR, layout parsing, and structured 
information extraction. 
Passionate about building practical AI systems that solve real-world problems and deliver measurable 
impact. 
Career Experience 
CTI Consulting GmbH, Kassel, Germany​
March 2023 – December 2025 
AI Engineer 
●​ Designed and deployed 8+ AI-driven solutions for real-world applications, focusing on data 
extraction, automation, and decision support systems. 
●​ Built pipelines processing millions of records, transforming unstructured data into structured 
insights for downstream systems. 
●​ Developed NLP and document-processing workflows, including OCR-based extraction and 
layout-aware parsing. 
●​ Improved model performance by 15–20% through feature engineering and optimisation. 
●​ Deployed scalable ML solutions using AWS and Docker, reducing deployment time by ~25%. 
DLR (German Aerospace Centre) – Berlin, Germany​
November 2021 – November 2022 
AI Engineer 
●​ Applied reinforcement learning techniques in experimental settings to optimise decision-making 
and control strategies within simulation environments. 
●​ Improved data workflows and automation, reducing data preparation time by ~25%. 
●​ Collaborated with multidisciplinary teams to translate research and engineering requirements into 
practical AI solutions.
